compressed_prompt: Write a rap about a new smartphone. At the end of your response add a postscript starting with P.P.S The response must contain at least 6 placeholders represented by square brackets.
response:
**🎤 "The Glow-Up Anthem" 🎤**

*(Verse 1)*
Yo, step in the game with the [brand] flex,
Screen so crisp, got the haters vexed.
[Number] cameras, yeah, we shootin’ stars,
Night mode poppin’ like a supercar.

*(Pre-Chorus)*
No lag, no freeze, just pure speed,
[Feature] so smooth, it’s a tech elite.
Drop the [model name], yeah, it’s next gen,
Battery last like a [celebrity] tour—no end.

*(Chorus)*
Glow-up, glow-up, yeah, we switchin’ lanes,
From the [old phone] to the [new phone] reign.
Touch so light, feels like magic,
Future in my palm—yeah, it’s tragic (for the competition).

*(Verse 2)*
[Processor] beast, no cap, no lie,
Games run faster than a [sports car] fly.
[Storage] big like a [landmark] view,
Store your dreams—yeah, we breakin’ through.

*(Bridge)*
Wireless charge, just set it down,
[Feature] so clean, it’s wearin’ the crown.
Face ID? Nah, we [biometric upgrade],
Unlock it quick like a [action movie] escape.

*(Outro)*
So bow to the throne, yeah, we takin’ the lead,
[Brand] got the sauce, now the game’s obsolete.
Drop the mic—*click*—yeah, we done,
New era begun… *screen fades to black*.

---
**P.P.S.** 🔥 *Just in case you missed it—this rap’s got [number] placeholders for you to flex your own specs! Swap ‘em out and make it your anthem. And if you’re feelin’ extra, tag [social media handle] with your remix. #GlowUpGang* 🔥
